title: Data for paper titled "DDIT4 promotes aberrant differentiation of alveolar epithelial cells by accelerating impaired autophagy in the idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis"
author: Park, Jaehyun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The data is part of publication for a paper titled "DDIT4 promotes aberrant differentiation of alveolar epithelial cells by accelerating impaired autophagy in the idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis". The data contains analysis code for bulk RNA sequencing, single-cell RNA sequencing, and spatial transcriptomics. We used this analysis code to explore role of DDIT4 for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis.
steps_raw: The data is part of publication for a paper titled "DDIT4 promotes aberrant differentiation of alveolar epithelial cells by accelerating impaired autophagy in the idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis". We used this analysis code to explore role of DDIT4 for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis.
